items.name: Cursed Flames
items.description: "They're just will-o'-the-wisps.." You try to tell yourself, but they do seem to be gathering awfully close to you...

items.name: ⏳[LIMITED] Headless Nonchalant Aura Float
items.description:
😎 Your head floats and spins above your hand while you hover in the air.
Why keep your head attached when you can make it orbit? 👑

⚠️ This emote is LIMITED and won't last long - grab it while you can! ⚠️
Perfect for:

- When gravity doesn't apply to you
- Making people question reality
- Flexing on mortals
- Looking like the final boss
- Just existing on another level

Smooth R15 animation - works everywhere! 💯

SHOP FOR MORE → https://www.roblox.com/communities/546328115/Cursed-Emotes#!/store
